title: Feedback - Mopinion form is opened
scenario: Mopinion feedback form in App Settings displays incorrectly with missing or malformed fields and options
steps: Go to App Settings (Home → Account → App Settings or similar)
Observe the Mopinion feedback form that loads
Check that the following option buttons are displayed: Bug, Suggestion, Compliment, Other
Check that the following input fields are displayed: Your Feedback, Name, Last name, Email
Check that a Send button is displayed
expected: The Mopinion feedback form displays correctly with all option buttons (Bug, Suggestion, Compliment, Other), all input fields (Your Feedback, Name, Last name, Email), and a Send button. The form loads as a proper web page.
